title: Copilot edited an ad into my PR
author: pavo-etc
aiHeadline: AI assistant accidentally turns your professional project into a commercial, proving that even robots can't resist the allure of capitalism.

title: How to turn anything into a router
author: yabones
aiHeadline: Transform your toaster into a Wi-Fi hotspot—because why not? Because your neighbors will probably hate you, that's why.

title: Fedware: Government apps that spy harder than the apps they ban
author: speckx
aiHeadline: Government releases 'spyware' app, proving they're better at surveillance than the apps they criticize. Spoiler alert: they're not.

title: Do your own writing
author: karimf
aiHeadline: AI can write, but maybe you should too—because if you don't, you might as well just hand over your job to a machine. And your dignity. And your soul.

title: How the AI Bubble Bursts
author: martinvol
aiHeadline: AI bubble bursts, leaving everyone wondering why they thought it was a good idea in the first place. Spoiler alert: it wasn't.
